---
name: Spike
about: Time-boxed research or investigation
title: ""
labels: "type:spike"
assignees: ""
---

## Question to Answer

What specific question does this spike need to answer?

## Why This Matters

How does the answer affect the next implementation decision?

## Time Box

Maximum effort: (e.g., 2 hours, 1 day)

## Approach

How will you investigate? What will you look at?

## Out of scope

What are you explicitly not building or deciding in this spike?

## Done When

- [ ] The question is answered.
- [ ] Findings are documented in `docs/discussions/` or the relevant component `docs/design/`.
- [ ] A follow-up issue or ADR is created if needed.

## Agent execution

`human review required` — Spikes involve judgment and design decisions. Agent can research and draft findings, but a human must review before follow-up work begins.
